# Muhammad Muchson Attoyibi

Muhammad Muchson Attoyibi adalah Software Engineer dan Academic Trainer 
dengan 5+ tahun pengalaman di EdTech, React, Flutter, Node.js, dan AI Integration.

- Email: muhammadmuchson@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muhammad-muchson-attoyibi/
- Website: https://muchson-landing-pages.vercel.app/

## Keahlian
React, Vue, Angular, Flutter, Node.js, Laravel, AI Integration, 
Curriculum Design, ADDIE Framework, EdTech Training

## Pengalaman
- AI Project Manager – Komdigi (Sep 2025–sekarang)
- IT Trainer – Digital Talent Indonesia (Jan–Aug 2025)
- Academic Project Coordinator – Alterra Academy (Jul 2022–Dec 2024)
